zh.lifeSummary: Edward Poynings於大約1460年出生在英國英格蘭素可波尼斯。他於1485年之前與Isabel Scott在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1521年10月22日在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德享年62歲，埋葬在英國肯特維斯韓格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Poynings于大约1460年出生在英国英格兰素可波尼斯。他于1485年之前与Isabel Scott在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1521年10月22日在英国英格兰肯特阿福德享年62岁，埋葬在英国肯特維斯韓格。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Poynings was born about 1460, in Poynings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He married Isabel Scott before 1485, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 22 October 1521, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Westenhanger, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Poynings est né environ 1460, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Isabel Scott avant 1485, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1521, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Westenhanger, Kent, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Poyningsは約1460年にイギリスイギリススセックスポイニングズで生まれた。1485年以前にイギリスでIsabel Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1521年10月22日にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードで62歳で死去し，イギリスケントウエステンハンジャーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Poynings(은)는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 포이닝스에서 태어났다. 그는 1485년 이전 영국에서 Isabel Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1521년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 웨스텐핸거에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Poynings nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Isabel Scott antes 1485, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1521, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Westenhanger, Kent, Inglaterra.

ro.<Layer Marney, Essex, Eng>: Layer Marney, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Poynings родился около 1460 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Scott перед 1485 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 октября 1521 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности вестенангир, кэнт, Англия.
